mapper.sql: h.id, h.title, h.content, h.class_id, c.class_name as class_name, h.subject, h.teacher_id, u.real_name as teacher_name, h.deadline, h.status, h.create_time, h.update_time, h.is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM homework h LEFT JOIN class_entity c ON h.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON h.teacher_id = u.id WHERE h.id = #{id} AND h.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO homework ( title, content, class_id, subject, teacher_id, deadline, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{classId}, #{subject}, #{teacherId}, #{deadline}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE homework
title = #{title}, content = #{content}, deadline = #{deadline}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE homework SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM homework_submission WHERE homework_id = #{homeworkId} AND is_deleted = 0
